# thoth_api_key_metrics (Data Source)

Reads live API key/runtime usage metrics for the current tenant.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `active_sdk_keys` (Number) Active SDK keys count.
- `avg_latency_ms` (Number) Average authorization latency in milliseconds.
- `key_usage_24h` (Number) Count of API key authorizations over trailing 24h.
- `metrics_json` (String) Raw metrics payload as JSON.
- `red_team_tests` (Number) Count of red-team tests over trailing 24h.
